channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Apple brings encrypted RCS chats to iPhone
item.description: Apple now lets you have encrypted RCS conversations with Android users through the Messages app on iOS. As part of iOS 26.5, which was released on Monday, Apple added support for end-to-end encrypted RCS messaging in beta, meaning that Apple and Google can't see your messages while they're sent. With iOS 26.5, you'll see a […]

item.title: OpenADR and Matter are collaborating to let your smart home talk to the grid
item.description: This should make it easier to connect appliances to demand response programs.

item.title: RCS chiffré entre iPhone et Android : Apple lance le déploiement avec iOS 26.5
item.description: Apple amorce ce jour le déploiement du chiffrement de bout en bout pour les conversations RCS entre iPhone et Android. C'est activé par défaut, mais ça reste une bêta soumise au bon vouloir des opérateurs.

item.title: Daniel Ek-backed defense tech Helsing to raise $1.2B at $18B valuation
item.description: Five-year old European military drone startup Helsing is close to raising another monster round.

item.title: 'For many such issues the simplest mitigation is to stop calling the buggyfunction. Killswitch provides that': Experts propose Linux kernel "killswitch" following worrying recent security issues
item.description: A maintainer wants a first-aid kit for the Linux kernel and a proposal is currently being reviewed.

item.title: There’s an Unhinged New Video Game About Trump and the Iran War
item.description: The game, developed by the group of anonymous artists known as Secret Handshake, is available online and in person in Washington, DC.

item.title: A New Hantavirus Vaccine Is in the Works
item.description: Since 2023, Moderna and Korea University have been developing a new mRNA vaccine for hantavirus. The work has been promising so far, but a finished product isn't likely coming any time soon.

item.title: AI agents are running hospital records and factory inspections. Enterprise IAM was never built for them.
item.description: A doctor in a hospital exam room watches as a medical transcription agent updates electronic health records, prompts prescription options, and surfaces patient history in real time. A computer vision agent on a manufacturing line is running quality control at speeds no human inspector can match. Both generate non-human identities that most enterprises cannot inventory, scope, or revoke at machine speed.That is the structural problem keeping agentic AI stuck in pilots. Not model capability. Not compute. Identity governance.Cisco President Jeetu Patel told VentureBeat at RSAC 2026 that 85% of en...

item.title: Bravo is creating unscripted microdramas for the Peacock app
item.description: As microdrama apps like ReelShort and DramaBox quietly rake in billions, Peacock announced on Monday that is launching two unscripted Bravo microdramas, which will stream in the Peacock app.

item.title: Update Your iPhone Now for Better Encrypted Messaging With Android
item.description: As part of the iOS 26.5 update, Apple’s Messages app can now encrypt texts between some iPhone and Android smartphones.

item.title: Texas sues Netflix for advertising ‘bait and switch’ and spying
item.description: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton has filed a lawsuit against Netflix, accusing the company of turning its back on its promise to remain ad-free and safe for kids. The lawsuit, filed on Monday, claims Netflix has "opened Texans' data for inspection by the same Big Ad Tech community it once criticized for exploiting users in […]

item.title: Digg tries again, this time as an AI news aggregator
item.description: Digg returns (again) as another place to read AI news.

item.title: OpenAI's ‘Trusted Contact’ feature for ChatGPT users in crisis is a sign AI is becoming something much more personal
item.description: OpenAI’s new Trusted Contact feature suggests ChatGPT is evolving from a chatbot into emotional infrastructure.

item.title: Venmo's redesigned app offers more discreet payments by default
item.description: New users will automatically have post visibility set to friends only instead of public.

item.title: The Mammotion LUBA 3 AWD 5000H robot lawn mower is on sale at Amazon for $400 off
item.description: The Mammotion LUBA 3 AWD 5000H robot lawn mower is on sale at Amazon for $2,899, down from the list price at Mammotion of $3,299. That's a 22% discount.

item.title: My Best Buy Plus memberships just got a permanent price drop down to $29.99
item.description: My Best Buy membership prices are changing. Plus memberships are now $20 cheaper, while Total memberships are $20 more.

item.title: This 'impressively rugged' portable power station 'opens up entirely new possibilities for living completely off-grid' — and it just got a massive discount ahead of festival season
item.description: I've found 7 power station offers from Bluetti, Jackery, EcoFlow and Anker, but one deal really stands out.

item.title: Don't buy this £150 Epson EcoTank printer deal at Amazon — I've found an even cheaper Epson ink tank printer that's basically identical in every possible way
item.description: Save yourself a little extra for what is essentially the exact same ink tank printer.

item.title: Comment demander la nouvelle carte d’identité électronique pour l’avoir sur smartphone ?
item.description: C’est la lente fin des cartes d’identité grand format. Après de longs mois d’attente, les détenteurs et détentrices du document tout plastique peuvent en demander le renouvellement anticipé pour, entre autres, avoir le document sur smartphone.

item.title: ‘Dizziness, nausea, vertigo, and sleep disruption’: The undetectable hum of AI data centers is making local residents sick
item.description: AI data centers rely on noisy equipment to function, and it is having a physical effect on local residents.

item.title: Pourquoi vous refusez (toujours) d’acheter un scooter ou une moto électrique
item.description: Le marché des deux-roues électriques traverse effectivement une zone de turbulences assez longue en France, en tout cas très nette depuis la supression du bonus écologique, fin 2024. Encore cette année les ventes patinent, et à ce rythme là, on roule tout droit vers la panne sèche. Voici les derniers chiffres du marché.

item.title: +22 % de ventes en un trimestre : la revanche inattendue des berlines face aux SUV
item.description: Après une décennie d'hégémonie des SUV et des crossovers, quelques constructeurs remettent la berline sur la table. Pas par nostalgie, mais parce que les prix s'envolent et que les marges se rééquilibrent. Reste à savoir si les clients seront au rendez-vous et reconsidéreront la berline dans leurs intentions d'achat.

item.title: The Steam Machine has a new reference in Steam's database, and it means we could be seeing it arrive very soon
item.description: Gamers are still awaiting the Steam Machine's arrival, after delays due to the ongoing RAM crisis, but it looks like it may be closer after all.

item.title: Xiaomi-Leica, Vivo-Zeiss, Oppo-Hasselblad : pourquoi Honor refuse de s’acheter un logo
item.description: Xiaomi a Leica, Oppo a Hasselblad, Vivo a Zeiss. Honor, lui, n'a personne au dos de ses smartphones, et c'est revendiqué. On a demandé pourquoi à ses responsables imagerie.

item.title: Democrats set on fighting $1 billion proposal that could fund Trump’s ballroom
item.description: The Senate is expected to vote on their version of the proposal this week. Republicans returning to Washington on Monday are facing questions about a $1 billion Senate security proposal that could help pay for President Donald Trump’s ballroom as Democrats say they will try to defeat it.Senate Republicans added the money for White House security to a spending bill that would restore funding for immigration enforcement agencies that Democrats have blocked since February. The steep security proposal was put forward after a man was charged with trying to assassinate Trump at the White House Corre...

item.title: 'Completely off the rails': TikTok is scaling back its AI summaries feature after it creates bizarre and inaccurate captions — as if TikTok wasn't bad enough for misinformation already
item.description: TikTok says it's pulling back a limited test of AI summary captions, after the feature kept making major mistakes.

item.title: Google stopped a zero-day hack that it says was developed with AI
item.description: For the first time, Google says it has spotted and stopped a zero-day exploit developed with AI. According to a report from Google Threat Intelligence Group (GTIG), "prominent cyber crime threat actors" were planning to use the vulnerability for a "mass exploitation event" that would have allowed them to bypass two-factor authentication on an unnamed […]...

item.title: Avec 260 € de réduction, l’iPad Air M3 est l’alternative moins chère et imparable au modèle M4 qui vient tout juste de sortir
item.description: L'iPad Air M3 est une tablette milieu de gamme par Apple qui offre de belles performances grâce à sa puce M3, même si celle-ci a été remplacée par le modèle M4. Mais ça permet à son prix de passer de 719 euros à 459 euros sur PC Componentes.

item.title: macOS : Apple devrait corriger l’interface Liquid Glass et confier le tri de vos onglets Safari à l’IA
item.description: Apple prépare un correctif visuel pour macOS, un an après avoir lancé un design que ses propres ingénieurs reconnaissent ne pas avoir eu le temps de finaliser. Safari, lui, gagne un classement automatique des onglets.

item.title: Did Euphoria really just kill off Rue?
item.description: "Euphoria" Season 3, episode 5 ends with a massive cliffhanger, as Alamo Brown gears up to kill Zendaya's Rue. But is she really gone?

item.title: Apple quietly released the all-new AirPods Max 2 last month — and you can already score a rare $40 discount at Amazon
item.description: The all-new AirPods Max 2 were just released last month, and Amazon already has an impressive $40 discount on the luxurious over-ear headphones.
